ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_score" INTEGER /* Score of the visiting team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "line" REAL /* Point spread or line for the game */,
  "total_line" REAL /* Total score or over/under line for the game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the conference belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the division's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the division's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Draft position of the player */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the coach */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the coach */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins by the coach */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses by the coach */,
  "playoff_championships" INTEGER /* Number of playoff championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_stats_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the bet was placed on */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., money line, spread, over/under) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Winnings from the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
